prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6984→8009→7430→7783→8008，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约8008名，近两年在7400–8000区间波动；该校 在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年119人、2022年124人、2023年121人、2024年133人、2025年144人，呈持续扩招态势；2026年计划142人，较2025年微减2人，属小幅缩招， 对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名稳定在第34名，近年排名未变，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉 评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸事件引发校园安全关注；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可。历史投档异常记录中未见重庆大学明 显断档信号；土木工程A+（全国顶尖）、电气工程A-、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、风景园林学A-，工科实力突出，电气、机械等专业与当前社会高热度专 业方向契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等专业社会热度持续走高；土木建筑（分化观望）热 度下降。湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争明显加剧；重庆大学位于重庆市，与湖南省 同属西南-华中区域，地理距离适中；该校在湖南省招生规模较大（2025年144人），属该校在省外的主要生源省份之一，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移 趋势、2026年招生计划微幅缩减、湖南省物理类考生显著增加（+8.4%）以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。预测最低位次约7971名，区间7471–8471 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6984 → 8009 → 7430 → 7783 → 8008, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend. The 2025 baseline is about 8008, with fluctuations in the 7400–8000 range in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province Physics Category was 119 in 2021, 124 in 2022, 121 in 2023, 133 in 2024, and 144 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 142, a slight decrease of 2 compared to 2025, which is a minor reduction and slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking is stable at 34th, unchanged in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident raising campus safety concerns. Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. No obvious admission cutoff signal was found in historical abnormal records. Civil Engineering is A+ (top nationally), Electrical Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-, with outstanding engineering strength. Electrical and Mechanical majors align with current high-demand professional directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), and Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) continue to have high social popularity. Civil Architecture (differentiated wait-and-see) has declining popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, which is in the same Southwest-Central China region as Hunan, with moderate geographical distance. The university has a large enrollment scale in Hunan Province (144 in 2025), making it one of its main source provinces outside the province, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and declining trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province (+8.4%), and the somewhat negative university reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7971, with a range of 7471–8471.

If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<7471), you can focus on reaching for top majors like Excellence Plan and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8471), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
